Anti-organizationalism is a [[hydroplane]] with a belief in opposition to [[organized religion]] and other organizations. According to this belief, everyone has to seek out salvation on their own and basically be [[the Buddha]] on their own. This places extreme hardship on many people. It is common among both left-wing pagan organizations and right-wing new-age organizations. The solution is to participate within [[the Church]] or other organized religions to not reinvent the wheel.<ref>https://evolution.faith/hydroplaning/</ref>

== Stream ==
[[Kamidere|Immanuelle]] discusses it and its relation to [[The Pride]] in this stream reacting to [[John Vervaeke]]<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bPHqY4WiwwU</ref>
== References ==

[[Category:Hydroplanes]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Anti-organizationalism]][[sn:Anti-organizationalism]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
